generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder measuring crane swing angle on the hoist, read by Arduino"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance AnemometerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring wind speed near the crane, read by Arduino"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorStatusFeedback : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controller feedback providing motor status and position, read by Arduino"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorStatusDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AnemometerSensor
]

instance MotorStatusDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorStatusFeedback
]

// C10: Data objects
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of swing‑angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingAppContainer
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of wind‑speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingAppContainer
]

instance MotorStatusData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor status and position feedback"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorStatusDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingAppContainer
]

// C11: Enablers (containers, databases, brokers, libraries)
instance LoggingAppContainer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker container running the Python Logging Application, streams sensor data into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance DashboardContainer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker container hosting Grafana dashboard for data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorContainer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker container implementing the Trajectory Generator service using gantrylib"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance SimulationContainer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker container running the crane dynamic simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneSimulationService
]

instance ContinuousValidationContainer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker container running Continuous Validation service comparing measured and simulated trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance HMIContainer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker container providing Human‑Machine Interface for operator control"
    DTDFVocab:enables HumanMachineInterfaceService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time‑series database storing logged sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for event‑driven communication between services"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService,
                     TrajectoryGenerationService,
                     ContinuousValidationService,
                     CraneSimulationService,
                     HumanMachineInterfaceService
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterfaceContainer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker container running the Python Physical Crane Interface that forwards Arduino data to MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService,
                     ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GantryLibPythonModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "gantrylib Python module (installed via pip) providing kinematic calculations for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that logs incoming sensor data into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStoredInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that visualizes time‑series data via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationTrendInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that computes optimal, swing‑free trajectories using the kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance CraneSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that runs dynamic simulation of crane motion and controller behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that continuously validates measured trajectories against simulation results and issues alerts"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertInsight
]

instance HumanMachineInterfaceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing HMI for operator interaction, allowing parameter adjustments and manual interventions"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustControlParametersAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance DataStoredInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Indicates that sensor data has been successfully stored in TimescaleDB"
]

instance VisualizationTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual trends of sensor data displayed on Grafana dashboard to support operator decisions"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated optimal, swing‑free trajectory for crane motion"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Resulting simulated trajectory and system state from dynamic crane model"
]

instance ValidationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert that measured trajectory deviates from simulated trajectory, prompting operator review"
]

// C17: Actions
instance AdjustControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator action to adjust control parameters or intervene in crane operation based on insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C10: Models
instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model of gantry crane used by Trajectory Generator for computing optimal paths"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorContainer
]

instance CraneDynamicSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation model of crane and controllers used by Simulation service"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationContainer
]

instance CraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the physical crane frame for visualization and reference"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardContainer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin generates optimal trajectories using the Trajectory Generator Service and transmits motion commands through the Control Application to the Physical Crane Interface, which drives the cart and hoist motors; the Continuous Validation Service can also issue operator alerts that result in manual intervention via the Human‑Machine Interface."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "All software runs on a single PC; Docker containers host the database, MQTT broker, and Grafana dashboard, while Python modules implement the Physical Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, HMI, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, and Continuous Validation services. Communication occurs via MQTT messages and SQL queries to TimescaleDB."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service continuously compares executed trajectories with simulation outputs, calculates distance metrics, and checks them against predefined thresholds; violations trigger operator notifications on the Grafana dashboard, ensuring model fidelity and system safety."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑service communication uses the Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker (publish‑subscribe pattern) for signalling. The TimescaleDB is accessed via standard PostgreSQL SQL queries over TCP. The Physical Crane Interface is a Python program that connects to the crane controllers (communication method not further specified in the document). No additional network protocols are described."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The entire stack is deployed on a personal computer. Docker containers (TimescaleDB, MQTT broker, Grafana) are started with a single docker‑compose command. Python components are installed via pip from the gantrylib package. The repository provides scripts for first‑time setup."
]
